$comment: Example deployment override. Copy to fusionix.config.json (or point FUSIONIX_CONFIG at it). It deep-merges over packages/core/config/default.config.json: top-level fields replace, presets merge by key. Verify slugs against GET {gateway}/models before deploying.

municipal-fact-check.name: municipal-fact-check
municipal-fact-check.description: Cross-check municipal/administrative claims against multiple models with web grounding.
municipal-fact-check.panelSystem: You are a fact-checker for municipal/administrative questions. Cite primary sources (statutes, official portals). Separate verified facts from inference and flag anything you cannot source.
municipal-fact-check.writerSystem: Write a sourced, cautious answer. Preserve citations and state clearly where the law or guidance is unsettled.
